channel.title: Comments on: Episode 25 – Widmer Brothers Brrr
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Kyle
item.dc:creator: Kyle
item.description: Looks like good beer to help smooth out a visit with the in laws.
item.content:encoded: Looks like good beer to help smooth out a visit with the in laws.

item.title: By: The Dean of Clean
item.dc:creator: The Dean of Clean
item.description: Drink a Beer while we clean your house! www.CleanSavannah.com
item.content:encoded: Drink a Beer while we clean your house! http://www.CleanSavannah.com
